# Tokaido Sanyo Kyushu Online Reservation
[
Book Now!
![](img/ic-link.webp)
](https://shinkansen2.jr-central.co.jp/RSV_P/smart_en_index.htm)
[
Book Now!
![](img/ic-link.webp)
](https://shinkansen2.jr-central.co.jp/RSV_P/S_smart_en_index.htm)
\*You need a membership registration
to book your shinkansen
tickets.
####
Your Complete Guide
from Registration to Boarding
[![Embedded YouTube video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/BTvxcP39sXI/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BTvxcP39sXI)
Reserve your
Shinkansen seat
###
anytime,
anywhere.
You can book online from your country or after arriving in Japan, whenever you like.
Select preferred seating from the cabin seating map. No service fee is required when
using the official reservation service. Travel smart on the Shinkansen.
![](img/bg-shinkansen.webp)
![](img/bg-shinkansen-sp.webp)
![](img/img-iphone-01.webp)
####
Ticket
is the QR code on
your mobile.
Open the reservation site and log in
to find the QR code in your ticket confirmation.
Skip queues by effortlessly scanning
your QR code at the ticket gates.
####
Change
your reservations
anytime, free of charge.
Found exciting new destinations? Need to change departure or arrival stations? Maybe
you have last-minute schedule changes?
Rest assured, you can modify reservations–up to 4 minutes before departure–at no
cost.
![](img/img-change.webp)
![](img/img-change-sp.webp)
![](img/img-book-early.webp)
![](img/img-book-early-sp.webp)
####
Book early
for better deals.

Special Discount
Offers

](https://smart-ex.jp/en/product/)

Why use the
###
Shinkansen
![](img/map-shinkansen.webp)
![](img/img-map.webp)
![](img/img-map-sp.webp)
TOKYO
NAGOYA
KYOTO
SHIN-OSAKA
HIROSHIMA
HAKATA
KAGOSHIMA-CHUO
Fast
and frequent!
![Fast Fast](img/img-item-01.webp)
Takes just 2 hours from Tokyo to Kyoto. Runs every 3 minutes during peak hours!
Safe
and punctual!
![Safe and punctual!](img/img-item-02.webp)
Proven safety record in 60 years of operation!
Comfortable
and relax!
![Comfortable and relax!](img/img-item-03.webp)
The seats are wide; there are no seat belts; and you are free to eat and drink on the
train!
